programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Sharing Chocolate

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Sweet Pawn of Mine
programme.desc: Kick off your shoes with the Pawn Stars when Rick and the Old Man are offered a pair of slippers owned by Pope Leo XIII.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Silver Linings
programme.desc: A guy brings in 100 pounds of pure silver. Rick gets stumped when a seller brings in a mysterious book.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: You're Out
programme.desc: Rick and Chumlee check out a 1969 Camaro Z28 that is in nearly mint condition. Then, a first edition baseball scorebook from 1878 is brought into the shop. Later, Corey visits a financial adviser to help reign in his wild spending habits.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Tough Cookie
programme.desc: Rick tries to get in on a deal involving a gold and silver Remington Arms gun. Then, a collection of Mr.T dolls arrives at the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Mr. Cool
programme.desc: A signed print of Ansel Adam's famous photograph, 'Monolith, the Face of Half Dome,' arrives at the shop. Then, a 1791 one-cent coin is brought in that could be worth a lot of money. Later, Corey notices that Rick keeps taking his things.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: I'll Be Doggone
programme.desc: Rick checks out a jetpack from the Gemini space program. Then, Chumlee's nuts over a Snoopy comic book with a personal drawing from Charles Schulz.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Monumental Pawn
programme.desc: Rick hits the road to take a look at a 1966 Chevy II. Then, he has the task of making a monumental decision when a program from the unveiling of the Statue of Liberty arrives. Later, Corey tries to justify his need for a company car.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: One Man's Junk
programme.desc: A baseball believed to have been signed by the 1959 World Series Champion Dodgers comes in to the shop. Then, Rick checks out a rare movie camera from the 1930s. Also, Old Man seeks revenge when Rick bans junk food in the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: G.I. Pawn
programme.desc: Two rare G.I. Joe playsets, a 1950s Chinese military motorcycle, a photograph and letter signed by poet Henry Wadsworth Longfellow, and an antique Black and Decker drill.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Longshot Pawn
programme.desc: A Nepalese Bira gun from the late 1800s, a 1970s Bob Peak TWA mural, a three-trumpet brass horn.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick or Treat
programme.desc: A 19th century vampire killing kit stakes out the shop. Equipment used for paranormal investigations is brought in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chum of All Fears
programme.desc: Corey and Chumlee try to pull off the perfect duo Halloween costume. Also, Corey checks out a 1933 Plymouth and a guy brings a 1977 Mattel Electronic Football Game in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Greatest Pawn on Earth!
programme.desc: An early edition of P.T. Barnum's autobiography has Rick willing to perhaps pay more for the book than it's worth. Curiousity is peaked when Rick is faced with a rare 1966 Doge Charger, complete with a Hemi engine. A Napoleonic era sword fascinates Chum.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: King of Pawntus
programme.desc: Dig up some history with the Pawn Stars when an ancient coin comes rolling into the shop. Will Rick walk away with this shiny silver in his pocket or will he end up empty handed?

programme.title: Pawn Stars: United States of Pawn
programme.desc: One million is on the line when a photograph of Abraham and Mary Todd Lincoln makes its way into the shop. Next, an Easter egg signed by the entire Bush family sends Chumlee hopping.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Off the Grid
programme.desc: Rick explores a Funko Pop! Mystery Box, while Corey and Chumlee enlist Rick Dale to rescue their fire alarm system. Then, the Pawn Stars get on their motorcycles to ride to Oregon to spruce up Rick's ranch with some new equipment.

programme.title: Wild Borneo
programme.desc: Borneo is the world’s third largest island. Shrouded in mist, this tropical island teems with strange and exotic life.

programme.title: Wild Thailand: Monkey Kingdom
programme.desc: Southern Thailand is a place of both spectacular natural beauty and unexpected surprise - where spirituality pervades every bit of life. For the animals that live here, this is a natural wonderland.

programme.title: Wild Thailand: Elephant Forest
programme.desc: In Central Thailands forests, fertile plains and even city streets, nature finds a way of living alongside people.

programme.title: Wild Thailand: Hidden Tiger
programme.desc: In the jungles of Phu Khieo live some unusual primates. Phayres leaf monkeys live up to their name eating the leaves of around a hundred different types of plant.

programme.title: China's Wild Side: Tibet's Animal Kingdom
programme.desc: Welcome to the roof of the world, the wild, mysterious animal kingdom of Tibet, where animals and people co-exist in a high altitude environment that pushes the toughest to their limits.

programme.title: China's Wild Side: Magical Beasts
programme.desc: Yunnan, China’s kingdom of wildlife, is home to the country’s greatest number of animal species.

programme.title: Battle of the Swamp Dragons
programme.desc: Florida's swamps are ruled by modern-day monsters. Giant alligators and crocodiles hunt side by side in these waters that are teeming with diverse wildlife.

programme.title: Komodo Dragons
programme.desc: We thought we knew everything there was to know about Komodo dragons, those giant reptiles that evolved away from the rest of the living world in an archipelago of a few islands off mainland Indonesia. Now we know that many of our certainties were myths.

programme.title: Crocpocalypse
programme.desc: In the bays and harbors of residential Florida, the threat of a crocodile attack looms as humans become too comfortable around these intelligent predators.

programme.title: Anaconda: Silent Killer
programme.desc: The anaconda is a giant snake with a killer reputation, but also widely misunderstood. Join us on a journey to uncover the truth about one of the biggest yet most secretive snakes on Earth.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Easter Island
programme.desc: The mysterious statues of Easter Island were built by one of the world's strangest and most isolated civilizations, and today, new evidence reveals why they were built and what caused Easter Island's sudden downfall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: The Iceman is the world's oldest and most perfectly preserved mummy, and brand-new cutting-edge forensic technology is revealing his darkest secrets; these discoveries could change everything we know about the humans who lived 5,000 years ago.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Seventh Wonder
programme.desc: The Lighthouse of Alexandria is one of the world's original Seven Wonders, but it could have been home to a mysterious superweapon, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the secrets of this fabled death ray and its long-lost home.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFOs and Temples of Gold
programme.desc: UFO experts investigate whether the value, reverence and desire for gold is the result of extraterrestrial landings in the ancient past.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Area 52
programme.desc: Few have ever heard about the ultra top-secret military base in the remote deserts of Utah known as Area 52.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFO Tech
programme.desc: Technology has transformed the way we live with artificial intelligence, high-energy laser, antigravity technology and alien-looking aircraft. We discuss if these advances are due to human effort or contact with UFOs.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Stonehenge on Mars
programme.desc: When NASA spots a something on Mars that resembles Stonehenge, they investigate what could have made this strange structure. Scientists discover a mysterious hole in Saturn's rings. An ancient tribe claims contact with alien visitors.

programme.desc: Discover how surfboards, stickers, and concrete roofing tiles are made.

programme.desc: Sanders, solid terrain models, stucco, high-speed roll-up doors.

programme.desc: Find out how throttle bodies, limestone fireplace mantels, candied fruit and jellies, and linen ukuleles are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Suits of Armor, Street Light Poles, Membrane Switch
programme.desc: Learn how suits of armor, street light poles, bent hardwood and membrane switches are made.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Mega Rig Overhaul
programme.desc: The Saipem 7000 is a gargantuan heavy-lift vessel equipped with two mega-cranes for world's toughest jobs, and now, she's faced with one of her hardest yet: upgrading a 30-year-old oil rig that sits in one of the most treacherous seas in the world.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Titan of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: One of the largest ships of the Great Lakes is a mammoth freighter named the Algoma Sault, and she and her crew face deadly ice, killer fog, and treacherous canal crossings to safely transport 28,000 tons of coal in a race against the clock.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Titan of the Deep
programme.desc: A colossal container ship must use cutting-edge tech and the latest marine engineering to brave treacherous tidal waters in a race against the clock to deliver perishable cargo.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Hell on Water
programme.desc: The Thermopylae is a massive vehicle carrier and one of the biggest ships ever built, and facing rough waves on deadly seas, her crew must navigate their priceless cargo to destinations on the other side of the world.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Cruise Ship Colossus
programme.desc: The Crown Princess is a titanic cruise ship that weighs over 100,000 tons, and in a race against the clock, its crew must use the latest tech and cutting-edge engineering to prepare for their next voyage.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: The Chernobyl Conspiracy

programme.desc: A woman tries to clear her husband after police say he committed a heinous murder.

programme.desc: Marcia Clark dives deep into the world of hip hop to search for the truth of what really happened to legendary DJ, Jam Master Jay. Marcia will navigate the twists and turns of numerous theories that surround the mysterious death of this icon.

programme.desc: New beginnings take a horrible turn when members of a blended family become deathly ill after ingesting a rare poison.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Desperate Times, Deadly Measures
programme.desc: An Appalachian couple is delighted when their neighbors return home after mysteriously disappearing for ten years. But they've changed, for the worse, unleashing a campaign of endless intimidation and harassment that ultimately ends in a bloodbath.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Cock-a-Doodle-Dead
programme.desc: A homeowner hopes the renters who move into the house beside him will be much better behaved than the previous tenants. When he determines they're not, the stage is set for bloody conflict and a shocking act of violence that threatens to claim many lives.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Duplex
programme.desc: After an early retirement, a man buys a duplex and rents half of it out to a troubled family. With the help of his gun, he sends an abusive husband packing and sets his sights on the wife.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: Masked Motives
programme.desc: After dating a short time, Tyrone Coles asks Denise Gay to move in with him even though family members on both sides oppose this arrangement. A series of tense confrontations leads to a vicious murder and twisted cover up.

programme.title: Truth About Murder With Sunny Hostin: Terrible Place to Die
programme.desc: A stranger brutally attacks two young women in a park in Portland, Texas. One victim is killed, while the other, miraculously survives. With the help of the survivor, investigators desperately hunt for the killer before he can strike again.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Turn
programme.desc: A couple escapes the hazards of the big city and moves to a country community. But suspicion that their new neighbors are in the drug trade turns into bloody rage with children in caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: Masked Motives
programme.desc: After dating a short time, Tyrone Coles asks Denise Gay to move in with him even though family members on both sides oppose this arrangement. A series of tense confrontations leads to a vicious murder and twisted cover up.

programme.desc: A couple escapes the hazards of the big city and moves to a country community. But suspicion that their new neighbors are in the drug trade turns into bloody rage with children in caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Duplex
programme.desc: After an early retirement, a man buys a duplex and rents half of it out to a troubled family. With the help of his gun, he sends an abusive husband packing and sets his sights on the wife.

programme.title: Dead of Night: I Know What Happened to That Girl
programme.desc: A young college student vanishes quietly into the darkness. Months later a shocking discovery is made, and the residents of the small town begin to question those they once believed were innocent. Before long, the truth will rise from the dead of night.

programme.title: Dead of Night: Nothing to Hide
programme.desc: In Bend, Oregon, Halloween night ends with a young woman's sudden disappearance. Suspicion of foul play runs deep, but her whereabouts remain a mystery. Over time, secrets begin to emerge and lead investigators to the least likely of suspects.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Sex, Lies and Audiotape
programme.desc: A mom accused of the murder of a stranger must clear her name by secretly-recording a confession from the man she claims is framing her. Sordid revelations of a secret life lead police to prove the guilt of an obsessive, cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Dead and Deleted
programme.desc: A mom of 3 in Georgia is killed after vanishing from home. Vital clues in the form of audio files captured by her tech-obsessed husband may be key to solving the mystery. As cops scrutinize the sounds, they make a grim discovery that betrays her killer.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Whispers from the Dead
programme.desc: In Little Falls, Minn., a retiree's peace is shattered by a home break-in, culminating in a gruesome double-homicide. Investigators discover audio recordings of the killings, revealing what really happened and the killer's true motives.

programme.title: Dateline: The Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: An ex-Navy man marries the love of his life. Five months later his new bride finds him dead on their bedroom floor. With no apparent cause of death, family and authorities are left puzzled.

programme.title: Dateline: The Night Before Halloween
programme.desc: In 1984, Robin Hoynes was murdered during a robbery attempt at the restaurant where she worked. An investigation spanning two decades finally leads police to a small, overlooked piece of evidence that points directly to her killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Identical twin daughters find their young mother dead at home in their safe, gated community. As the investigation begins, detectives uncover clues buried in the victim's past, plus a hidden diary.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Cost of Competition
programme.desc: When the home of the Resaca, Georgia 'Carpet King' is showered with gunfire and kills beloved daughter Tara Swilley, the self-made millionaire is convinced one of his business partners must be behind the killing.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Roses are Red, Murder is Too
programme.desc: When a town counsel member is found murdered in her home, residents of Berryville, Virginia are appalled. With the only evidence being the single bullet that took her life, the slaying begins to look more and more like a professional hit.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Horror in the Heartland
programme.desc: Neighbors are sometimes miles apart in the tiny town of Horton, Kansas, but news travels fast when Patricia Kimmi disappears from her home. Evidence leads investigators to believe she may not be found alive. And worse, that her killer still lurks.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Answering the Call
programme.desc: When a brush fire is reported in rural Winchester, TN, first responders are horrified to find the body of young Megan Sharpton at the center of the blaze.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it's up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent. Then A shooting in a dive bar leads to a quick arrest, but Kenda can't quite shake the feeling that something is amiss.

programme.title: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Discovering America
programme.desc: Explore the truth behind the men who discovered the New World and take a trip to discover the real facts behind the most famous bridge and road in America.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Engineering America
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind the myths that surround our most revered patriotic symbols and we unveil the surprising facts of two great feats of engineering: the Panama Canal and the Transcontinental Railroad.

programme.title: American Titans: Edison vs. Tesla
programme.desc: In the late 1800's a new life-changing electrical industry emerges with the two greatest minds of the day, Thomas Edison and Nikola Tesla, backing opposing positions on how the multi-million dollar industry will transmit power for the next century.

programme.title: American Titans: Rockefeller vs. Scott
programme.desc: John D. Rockefeller, the young new king of kerosene, and Thomas A. Scott, the visionary behind the Pennsylvania Railroad Company, battle for control of America's new oil industry.

programme.title: American Titans: Vanderbilt vs. Drew
programme.desc: Railroad kingpin Cornelius Vanderbilt takes on his old friend Daniel Drew in a Wall Street war for the Erie Railroad. Vanderbilt has millions, but sly Drew and his protégés, Jay Gould and Jim Fisk, are set to break the bank of America's biggest tycoon.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Striking it Rich
programme.desc: Discover the real facts behind America's biggest economic boom and biggest bust, and learn the truth behind some of Las Vegas' greatest myths.

programme.title: American Titans: Rockefeller vs. Scott
programme.desc: John D. Rockefeller, the young new king of kerosene, and Thomas A. Scott, the visionary behind the Pennsylvania Railroad Company, battle for control of America's new oil industry.

programme.title: American Titans: Vanderbilt vs. Drew
programme.desc: Railroad kingpin Cornelius Vanderbilt takes on his old friend Daniel Drew in a Wall Street war for the Erie Railroad. Vanderbilt has millions, but sly Drew and his protégés, Jay Gould and Jim Fisk, are set to break the bank of America's biggest tycoon.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Striking it Rich
programme.desc: Discover the real facts behind America's biggest economic boom and biggest bust, and learn the truth behind some of Las Vegas' greatest myths.

programme.title: American Titans: Edison vs. Tesla
programme.desc: In the late 1800's a new life-changing electrical industry emerges with the two greatest minds of the day, Thomas Edison and Nikola Tesla, backing opposing positions on how the multi-million dollar industry will transmit power for the next century.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Engineering America
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind the myths that surround our most revered patriotic symbols and we unveil the surprising facts of two great feats of engineering: the Panama Canal and the Transcontinental Railroad.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Discovering America
programme.desc: Explore the truth behind the men who discovered the New World and take a trip to discover the real facts behind the most famous bridge and road in America.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Hitler's Zombie Army
programme.desc: Truth is revealed of the Allied 'monument men' discovery in 1945 of rotting corpses of Germanic heroes. A world of magic, high priests and secret castles is exposed.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Adolf Hitler launches the largest military offensive in history against the Soviet Union: Operation Barbarossa. Blinded by his fire power, Hitler signs his death sentence.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Franklin D. Roosevelt
programme.desc: Japanese bombers attack Pearl Harbor and sink a large part of the US Pacific Fleet. President Franklin D. Roosevelt decides it's time for the United States to strike back.

programme.title: Whitey Bulger: Final Takedown
programme.desc: In 1995 ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barn Beam Log Cabin Experiment
programme.desc: Mark clients want bigger and bigger antique log homes, but pioneers didn't build big log cabins. They did build big barns though, so the guys try and build a 1200 sq. foot cabin using barn beams from their inventory.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Turning a Tobacco Farm Cabin Into a Tasting Room
programme.desc: Mark and the guys save a log cabin from an old Virginia tobacco farm and to turn it into a tasting room for a local distillery.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Leftovers Get Upcycled
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders are using their leftovers to build a 'Parts and Pieces Pavilion' to sell their scraps as upcycled products.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Container Dreamhouse
programme.desc: First-time builders Shay and Shae set out to build a home using five shipping containers on a wooded lot in Oklahoma. They hope his background in electrical and welding, and their collection of building materials, helps them finish the job quickly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Woodland Expedition
programme.desc: A young man is designing his first home on family land in rural Illinois to be off the grid and on the go. He and his buddy combine their experience as long-distance travelers to improvise their build through a Midwest winter.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Modern Farmhouse
programme.desc: A family builds an ultra-modern farmhouse completely off the grid in the verdant Wisconsin countryside. When the project extends into winter, they're pushed to the breaking point as they face the impact of extreme cold on the build and themselves.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Time Capsule Cabin
programme.desc: Brock and Chase update a fourth-generation family cabin on Lake Charlotte, Minnesota. They give one room a bigger feel with new paint and a custom barn wood-framed window, and a breakfast nook adds a great space for family gatherings.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Anderson Job
programme.desc: Greg and Lisa Anderson are not fans of the current style of their dark, outdated kitchen. The country cottage cabinets and lack of natural lighting convinces the couple to take on their biggest renovation project yet.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Kimble Job
programme.desc: Danielle and Darrell hate their master bedroom. The hideous floor to ceiling flower-motif wallpaper is their largest problem with the area. The walls are extremely thin so they plan to completely gut the room.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Gunther Job
programme.desc: Chad and Katie Gunther hate their cramped and outdated kitchen, so they're going to renovate the space and incorporate their dining room area to open it up.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Zalezsak Job
programme.desc: Allison and Peter Zalezsak love everything about their home, everything except their master bathroom.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Henderson Job
programme.desc: Stories of the hard and sometimes crazy work that goes into home renovations.

programme.title: Philly Revival: Philly Street Flippin'
programme.desc: Licensed contractor, real estate expert and designer Rachel Street flips an historic row home in her hometown of Philadelphia, PA. She transforms the first floor into an open-concept space and exposes the brick along one side of the home.

programme.title: Philly Revival: It's Phlippin' Huge
programme.desc: Rachel renovates a grand row home in the up-and-coming neighborhood of East Passyunk. Immediately, she faces structural problems in the century-old property and has to rebuild the entire exterior wall. She also revives the ornate turrets.

programme.title: Philly Revival: It's Phlippin' Small
programme.desc: Rachel Street tackles a tiny row home in South Philly's Whitman district. After extending the second floor to add an additional 150 square feet, she makes the space seem brighter and larger by white washing the interior brick and using light colours.

programme.title: Philly Revival: A Troubled Twin
programme.desc: Rachel tackles a twin row home in Germantown that was partially rehabbed by a previous owner. She quickly discovers the previous work is less than perfect and is forced to rebuild the rotting roof, install new brick on the exterior and add new insulation.

programme.title: Philly Revival: An Urban Retreat
programme.desc: Rachel Street renovates a huge, turn-of-the-century home in the Mt. Airy district. She decides to restore several of the property's original features, including a walled-up sun porch, elaborate fireplaces and cabinetry.

programme.title: Philly Revival: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Rachel takes on a row home that is double the width of a regular row house in the popular Dickinson Narrows neighbourhood. The renovation goes from a cosmetic rehab to a full gut job as she discovers serious plumbing issues.

programme.title: Philly Revival: Anything But Basic
programme.desc: Rachael takes on a builder-basic row home in Philadelphia's East Passyunk neighborhood and intends to flip it fast. Her plan for converting this home into a designer-chic abode includes rebuilding the kitchen peninsula and creating entertaining space.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Fire Salvaged Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Mystery House
programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage that he purchased before seeing the full interior. The duo soon finds themselves in over their heads when they realize it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Revolutionary Roasts
programme.desc: Mass. Roger puts the pedal to the metal on Chef Jeremy Stanton's 'Rotisserie Bike.'

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Food Traditions
programme.desc: Roger visits New England for two unique food traditions that celebrate family, friends and the community.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: A Tale Of Two Bbqs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits an old-school barbecue institution serving chopped pork in South Carolina and a popular restaurant serving Hill County barbecue classics in Texas.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Get Your Grill On
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Lockhart, Texas, to meet the team responsible for designing and crafting a monster rig that offers seven different cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Pork
programme.desc: Roger Mooking travels the country to discover the top fifteen greatest pork dishes.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Ooey, Gooey and Cheesy
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets messy in New Orleans with a bacon-onion jam, brie and brioche burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beers, Burgers and Bocce in Baltimore
programme.desc: Actor and proud Baltimore native Josh Charles meets up with Michael at his favourite place for crab cakes in a town where everyone fights over where to find the very best. Then, they have a heated round of bocce ball in the Little Italy neighborhood.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Smoked and Savory
programme.desc: In Queens, New York, Michael Symon dives into the juiciest, meatiest, triple-stacked burger with beef, lamb and turkey. Some of the most authentic Mexican lamb barbacoa this side of the border is found in Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Smorgasbord For A Shark's Appetite
programme.desc: In Savannah, Ga., Michael Symon finds a food truck serving up two can't-miss creations: cheeseburger tacos with a house-made beer cheese sauce and a Jamaican jerk fried fish taco with mango salsa.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Diego, CA
programme.desc: Casey travels to San Diego to face off against a five and a half pound stack of pancakes layered with bacon, eggs, sausage, country-fried steak and thick-cut ham.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Louisville, Kentucky, for some epic eats, including a booze-infused Southern staple and a one-of-a-kind spicy popcorn and frozen hot chocolate challenge in nearby Santa Claus, Indiana.

programme.desc: Lucha Bros vs. SCU to crown the inaugural AEW Tag Team Champions. AEW champion Chris Jericho and Cody sign the contract for their Full Gear title fight. Kenny Omega and The Young Bucks vs. Kip Sabian and TH2. Hangman Page vs. Sammy Guevara.

programme.title: Movie: The Longest Yard
programme.desc: Paul 'Wrecking' Crewe, a former football superstar, ends up in prison after a drunk driving incident, and is recruited by the warden to put together an inmate football team to compete against the prison guards.

programme.desc: Trying to lose weight, Philip has a heart attack after eating a cheeseburger 'treat.'

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Take My Cousin - Please

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: You've Got to Be a Football Hero

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: 'Twas the Night Before Christening

programme.title: Movie: Love and Basketball
programme.desc: Two friends confront deep changes when they both commit themselves to basketball.

programme.title: Movie: With Love, Christmas
programme.desc: An ad executive and her uptight co-worker must create the ultimate Christmas commercial. To complicate things, they are also each-others Secret Santa.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Love
programme.desc: A CEO sends his son to learn about their bakery business at their flagship store in advance of him taking over the company. He learns the ropes from the local baker and the more time they spend together, the closer they get.

programme.title: Movie: Finding Santa
programme.desc: When the Santa who stars in their annual holiday parade falls off his sleigh and injures himself, a woman must go on a quest to find the perfect Santa.

programme.title: Movie: A Very Merry Mix-Up
programme.desc: A woman is headed to spend the holidays with her fiancé's family, but a mix up at the airport lands her at the wrong home. She quickly forms a bond with the 'wrong' family, especially the handsome son.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Under Wraps
programme.desc: A woman loses her job and beau on the same day and reluctantly accepts a position in Alaska. When she gets the position she originally hoped for, she must choose between a life she's always wanted and her new life in Alaska.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Homestead
programme.desc: A famous actress heads to a Christmas-obsessed town to film a movie, and is thrown for a loop when a romance brews between her and a local inn keeper, who's a single dad. As she gets a taste of small-town life, she discovers the true meaning of Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Entertaining Christmas
programme.desc: A cookbook author's daughter is set to take over the family business. Only problem is, she can't cook. When she sees an online video asking for help, she is determined to change the family ways, and become known for helping in other ways.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Graceland
programme.desc: A woman brings her kids with her on a business trip to Memphis so they can go to Graceland. While there, she bumps into an old flame from her singing days in college. Together they make beautiful holiday music.

programme.title: Movie: Miss Christmas
programme.desc: Nicknamed 'Miss Christmas,' the official tree finder for the Radcliffee tree lighting, is left desperate to find the perfect tree. A letter sends her to a small town and a man who doesn't want to part with this tree.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actors Jodie Sweetin and Andrew Walker from the Hallmark Channel original movie 'Merry & Bright' visit. Actress Brooke D'Orsay talks about the Hallmark Movies & Mysteries original 'Nostalgic Christmas.'

programme.title: Movie: Merry Matrimony
programme.desc: An advertising executive lands her dream assignment organizing the perfect Christmas wedding for a fashion magazine. She finds that she has unknowingly been paired with her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Movie: The Mistletoe Promise
programme.desc: Two strangers who share a disdain for Christmas navigate their holiday complications together by creating The Mistletoe Promise. As they spend more time with each other, they discover there may be more to their contract.

programme.title: Movie: The Most Wonderful Time of the Year
programme.desc: A single mother who's lost all interest in Christmas finds just what she needs when her uncle comes to visit.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Operation Career
programme.desc: Homes and lives of veterans across the country are transformed by a team of experts.

programme.title: Movie: Grumpy Cat's Worst Christmas Ever
programme.desc: A lonely cat in a mall pet shop develops a sour outlook on life due to never getting chosen by customers. That all changes one day when a young girl enters the pet store and falls in love with her after realizing she can hear this unique cat talk.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas on Chestnut Street
programme.desc: When a store accidentally orders 60,000 Christmas lights for the holidays, they promote a decorating contest in their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Proposal
programme.desc: A lawyer second-guesses his proposals to both his job and his fiancé while rekindling his love for an old flame.

programme.title: Movie: A Dad for Christmas
programme.desc: Matt goes to see his newborn son at the hospital only to discover he is up for adoption.

programme.title: Movie: All I Want for Christmas
programme.desc: After being told by her boss that she must listen more attentively to others and put the group first, Elizabeth, a skilled executive, meets one of Santa's helpers, who blesses her with an extraordinary gift.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: It's In Your Brain
programme.desc: Doctors and the CDC in Atlanta spent months trying to figure out what California honeymooners, a surfer in Hawaii and a toddler in Tennessee have in common.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend’s house. She was never seen or heard from again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes

programme.desc: Breaking news forces Josh to race across the globe. One of the wickedly hard puzzles of The Secret, a case Josh has been chasing for years, might have been solved. He's been crisscrossing the US to track it down, but this solve is in Josh's hometown.

programme.title: Botched: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Paul follows a hunch and orders more tests for a woman with a severely botched nose and discovers shocking news. The doctors work in tandem to get two 'botched bunnies' back in centerfold shape.

programme.title: Botched: The Wizard of Schnoz
programme.desc: Terry makes a breast cancer survivor feel whole again while Paul operates on two sisters' twin beaks, affirming that he is the true Wizard of Schnoz. Terry gets a visit from his favorite patient...his wife, Heather.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives Tournament: Part 2
programme.desc: A wildly diverse group of chefs from Triple D descends on Flavortown as the Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives Tournament continues! The heat is on as chefs make a hot sandwich without shopping in the meat, cheese and deli aisles.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives Tournament: Part 3
programme.desc: In round one, the chefs must check out through the express lane and make comfort food using seven items or less. Next, the chefs make their best dinner using the subpar ingredients from a game of Grocery Golf.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives Tournament: Part 4
programme.desc: Triple D alumni from across the country mix it up in the market. Chefs must shop for a family feast using the smallest grocery bags ever seen. Then, they must prepare an elegant dinner that incorporates crazy ingredients.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives Tournament: Finale
programme.desc: The winners of the first four DDD's throw downs are back for the finale! First, they must dish out their best diner breakfast using a grocery list made up of emojis; then, the chefs must create the ultimate drive-in burger featuring a red light special.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Food Truck Teams
programme.desc: Guy Fieri knows that food trucks have surged in popularity recently, so he's bringing in three teams of food truck chefs to battle it out for Flavortown superiority.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Home Cooks!
programme.desc: For anyone who has ever said, 'Hey, I can do that!', Guy Fieri brings four confident home cooks to Flavortown to prove they can actually cook like GGG's finest chefs.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Frozen Food Fight
programme.desc: Guy asks chefs to shop and cook from the frozen foods section.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Souper Good
programme.desc: Ree whips up four stunning soups, starting with the kid-favorite Hamburger Soup. Tomato Soup With Parmesan Croutons makes an incredible make-ahead freezer dish. Sausage, Potato and Kale Soup is a one-pot wonder and her Spinach Soup is liquid soul food.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Weeknite Warrior
programme.desc: Make a whole week's worth of dinners with five easy recipes from The Kitchen gang, plus get easy tips to simplify prep and make mealtime easier.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Comforting Classics
programme.desc: Geoffrey Zakarian kicks things off with a decadent Truffled Mushroom and Cheesy Mac and Cheese, and Sunny Anderson and Jeff Mauro show two new twists on Banana Bread.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Tailgating 2.0
programme.desc: Katie Lee kicks off tailgate season with her slow cooker Buffalo chicken chili, while Sunny Anderson's cheese and charcuterie football has fans cheering for more. Alton Brown joins the fun with a tailgating challenge for the gang.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Best of Chocolate Lovers
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is sharing some of the recipes that have rocked her chocolate-loving family's world through the years. There's Ladd's chocolate pie, his all-time favourite dessert, and chocolate butterscotch caramel bars.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Feeding 101
programme.desc: Ree cooks up three comforting make-ahead meals, including chicken cordon bleu casserole, and tex-mex tamale pie with a spicy beef filling.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: She's a Lady
programme.desc: The search is on for two ladies to beat Bobby Flay. In this episode it's cooking show host Giovanna Huyke and caterer Jennifer Bajsel. In the judges seats are Alex Guarnaschelli and Katie Lee.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Clash of the Culinary Titans
programme.desc: The Kitchen's Sunny Anderson and Chopped's Ted Allen have Bobby Flay in their sights and are calling in two contenders to finish the job.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Out of the Pan and into the Fire

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: New Kids on the Butcher Block
programme.desc: Two former winners of Food Network Star, Jeff Mauro and Justin Warner, turn the tables on Bobby as they bring in two fantastic chefs to beat him. Bobby has his work cut out for him with sweet, but fiery, Chef Daniela D'Ambrosio and eager-to-prove-himself.

programme.title: Halloween Wars: Witches vs. Warlocks

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Tasmanian Tiger Down Under
programme.desc: After numerous, credible eyewitness accounts of the Tasmanian Tiger in Australia, James Cook University has researchers on the move. Forrest joins their study before heading deep into the Cape York Peninsula in his second attempt to find the species.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Madagascar Giant
programme.desc: Madagascar's Pachylemurs were red, furry giants, nearly the size of great apes. Recently discovered remains disprove that they went extinct 1000 years ago and Forrest scales the canopy of the jungle on a mission to prove the giant species still lives.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Galapagos Giant
programme.desc: Forrest is in the Galapagos seeking the Fernandina Tortoise, an animal that was only seen once, over 100 years ago. The clues are here, along with an abundance of incredibly unique species, raising hopes of a historic discovery.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Recovered Evidence: The Javan Tiger
programme.desc: Featuring all-new footage from Forrest's expeditions. Forrest delves into the vibrant island of Java in Indonesia in an attempt to find the Javan Tiger. This exotic predator was declared extinct in 2003, but recently sighted.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Dracula Monkey of Borneo
programme.desc: Forrest returns to the volcanic islands of Indonesia to find the Millers Grizzled Langur, otherwise known as the Dracula monkey. When locals inform him of an illegal pet market, his search quickly evolves into a rescue mission.

programme.title: Little Giants: Eight-legged Nightmare
programme.desc: After a harrowing search in a South African cave, the team tracks down the elusive, spine-chilling tailless whip scorpion. When they test its lethal attributes, they quickly discover that this supreme nocturnal predator is a real life nightmare.

programme.title: Little Giants: Alien Amphibian
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Madagascar, Bradley and Billy discover a creature unlike anything else on Earth: the tomato frog. In their mobile lab, they discover the frog's astonishing abilities from a toxic force field to a self-inflating body.

programme.title: Little Giants: Murderous Mouse
programme.desc: The team scours the Sonoran Desert for North America's mightiest mouse: the carnivorous grasshopper mouse. An impressive vertical leap, size-defying bite force, and bone-shaking howl allow this rodent to transform into a vicious scorpion kiler at night.

programme.title: Little Giants: Winged Warrior
programme.desc: Bradley and Billy are hunting for dragons deep in the rainforests of Thailand. The flying dragon rules the jungle canopy, and the team hope to discover how this lizard's ability to glide has enabled it to dominate its environment for 250 million years.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Puppy Power
programme.desc: Little Roo is the smallest of a litter of Beagles, but proves to his much bigger sisters that he is top dog. A litter of super fluffy Bichon Frise pups follow mom's path to show dog stardom.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Cat Escape!
programme.desc: Family will not visit Don and Addie because of their ferocious feline, Addie.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Gorilla with Heart
programme.desc: Surgery on a silverback gorilla's broken canine reveals a more serious medical issue. Love may be in the air for two birds of paradise, Glory and Holiday. And, dozens of venomous tarantulas keep the staff on their toes.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Sea Lion Pup Grows Up
programme.desc: Zoo staff face unexpected setbacks weaning a bright sea lion pup off her mother's milk. The bird team steps in to support a rejected curassow chick. And, a squirrel monkey pays a visit to the dentist.

programme.title: The Zoo: Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: Leo, a snow leopard rescued from Pakistan, is having trouble eating because of a broken canine. The bird department works feverishly to restore a beehive for the bee-eater birds. Ambassador Center staff work with an adorable fennec fox named Charlie.

programme.title: Give a Dog a Home: Live!

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Southern Dogs in the City
programme.desc: Villalobos is invited to participate in Dog Bowl, creating a chance for a handful of dogs to steal the spotlight. M2 helps a neglected dog left in horrible conditions. And a couple takes the first step towards becoming parents - adopting a Villalobos dog.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Last of the Mobsters
programme.desc: Tia and her kids race to rescue a stray dog near a dangerous, busy highway. An adoption requires some temperament testing in an 18-wheel truck when a trucker wants to adopt a dog to join him on the road. And, a return adopter seeks out a senior dog.

programme.title: Tanked: My Tank From Hell: Not-So- Freshwater Tank

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Generational Dreams
programme.desc: A Florida man who fondly remembers childhood summers spent in the Bahamas with his father is ready to pursue his father's dream of owning a home on the island. With his father smiling down, he and his wife seek a home to keep his legacy alive.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Why Did We Wait So Long?

programme.title: House Hunters: Guerneville Getaway
programme.desc: A buyer priced out of San Francisco is looking to buy a weekend place in nearby Guerneville, California. She has her heart set on a vintage cabin close to town, but her old roommate and touring partner think she needs a newer, lower maintenance place.

programme.title: House Hunters: A Basement for the Band
programme.desc: A New Jersey rocker couple hopes to find a home that fits their lifestyle. While the night owls agree they want a master with few windows, she's looking for an older Colonial with lots of charm while he's got his heart set on an updated mid-century home.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Tip Top Parenting in Penang
programme.desc: A forward-thinking couple is taking parenting to the next level by moving to Penang, Malaysia, so their kids can grow and evolve in a cultural melting pot. The hard part, however, is going to be agreeing on their new home's interior.

programme.title: House Hunters: Compromise in Waukesha

programme.title: House Hunters: Reluctant to Renovate in Charlotte

programme.desc: A Pittsburgh entrepreneur has saved all her coins with hopes of finding a beach house in Nassau, Bahamas. She's searching for a place that can partially pay for itself through rentals.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Annabelle's Curse
programme.desc: In a spine-tingling Halloween special, Zak and the crew take part in a historic investigation as they come face-to-face with the most evil doll in the world. Afterwards, Zak gives fans a chance to explore the haunted museum before its grand opening.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Hauntings of Vicksburg: McRaven Mansion
programme.desc: Zak and the crew are called upon by the mayor of Vicksburg, Mississippi, to explore the Siege of Vicksburg and its lasting impact on the city. Their first stop is McRaven Mansion, widely considered to be the most haunted building in the South.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Hauntings of Vicksburg: Demons And Dolls
programme.desc: Zak and the crew continue their exploration of Vicksburg, MS, by investigating a demonic presence at a hair salon that was hit by cannon fire during the Civil War. They also investigate an antique doll museum said to contain dolls that come alive.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Hauntings of Vicksburg: Spirits Under Siege
programme.desc: Zak and the crew uncover dangerous paranormal activity at two abandoned locations in Civil War-scarred Vicksburg, Mississippi. First, a former Elks Lodge where an unsolved murder occurred. Then, a hospital with a history of disease and death.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Hauntings of Vicksburg: Champion Hill Battlefield
programme.desc: Zak and the crew continue their Civil War investigation with the Battle of Champion Hill. Zak digs deep into the historic soil, which was the site of 6,000 casualties, and follows the trail of evil extending into the surrounding forest.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Serial Killer Spirits: H.H. Holmes Murder House
programme.desc: Zak and the crew investigate the Irvington, Indiana, home where H.H. Holmes killed a nine-year-old boy. The current owner believes dark and sinister forces have overtaken the property, leaving her vulnerable to possession.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Serial Killer Spirits: John Gacy Prison
programme.desc: Zak and the crew head to Illinois in search of the spirit of infamous serial killer John Gacy. Their investigation leads them to the Old Joliet Prison, where they hope to come face-to-face with the Killer Clown himself.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Serial Killer Spirits: Axe Killer Jail
programme.desc: Zak and the crew travel to Council Bluffs, Iowa, to investigate the jail that once held Jake Bird, a prolific serial killer who may have killed as many as 46 people and was said to have placed a deadly curse on the men who convicted him.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Jack the Ripper
programme.desc: New discoveries from space give experts new clues in the hunt for Jack the Ripper. When a strange object crash-lands in Antarctica, experts speculate it could be an alien visitor.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Who Built Supervillain Island?
programme.desc: A satellite spots a set of huge arrows in the badlands of the American west. A blood red waterfall stains Antarctica's snows. A plague of huge holes in the Siberian landscape.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Forbidden Cities of the Maya

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hitler's Lost Gold
programme.desc: New evidence might finally identify the hiding place of Hitler's billion-dollar gold train. A discovery of a long-lost settlement rewrites the history of the Vikings in North America. A blood-red river in Siberia points to catastrophic pollution.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Midnight Train to Hell
programme.desc: A sinister locomotive breathes fire into the night sky, and locals fear it's a demonic train coming to claim their souls. When something terrifying emerges from a mysterious lake in Ireland, experts wonder if it could be a modern-day leviathan.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Lake of the Dead
programme.desc: Marine scientists discover a gruesome underwater death zone that seems to kill anything that dares to enter. When apocalyptic skies appear during a deadly earthquake in Ecuador, residents fear it's the end of days.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Incident at Area 51
programme.desc: Near Area 51, a police convoy is filmed transporting an alien-looking craft in the dead of night. When strange beams of light are reported in Argentina, experts investigate if it's proof of a terrifying Nazi superweapon.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Omen of Blood River
programme.desc: When a river of blood washes through a city's streets, some witnesses believe it's a warning of doomsday. A strange perfect circle emerges in the clouds about California, and some experts speculate that it's evidence of alien activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: It Came From the Fog
programme.desc: When a mysterious fog and a huge explosion strike at once, some suspect a napalm attack on American soil, but using cutting-edge technology, experts find that the truth could be more dangerous than ever imagined.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Stargate in the Jungle
programme.desc: Something strange is caught on camera in a tunnel beneath the Colombian jungle, leading experts to wonder if it's a wormhole to far-off places in the cosmos. Using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if there's an interdimensional conspiracy at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien in the Abyss

programme.desc: When a young woman and her babies vanish, detectives learn that a second woman and her baby are missing too, and one man may be responsible for both disappearances.

programme.desc: In New Orleans, a young mother is ambushed at home and shot at close range. Detective Rob Barrere's case depends solely on the eyewitness account of a four-year-old girl and leads to another brutal death.

programme.title: The First 48: Missing Persons: The Good Mother

programme.title: American Justice: Blood Brothers: The Derek and Alex King Case
programme.desc: Witness the shocking story of how two young Florida boys were led to kill their father.

programme.title: American Justice: Framed
programme.desc: The shocking story of Clarence Brandley, an innocent man convicted of murder.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Dark Side of the City
programme.desc: For the men and women on the Nightwatch, two things never stop: the calls and the questions. The first responders do everything they can to save the victims of several shootings, a drug overdose and more.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Full Moon Rising
programme.desc: It's a full moon in New Orleans, and sure enough, all night long, the calls for the EMTs seem to get crazier and crazier. There's a machete hacking, a man whose finger is bitten off by a dog and a guy stabbed by a man dating his ex-wife.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Fifty Tons
programme.desc: A local casino's connection to a prostitution ring may give detectives the chance to hurt the cartels.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Sister Load
programme.desc: The seizure of 350 pounds of marijuana leads the unit to a similar sister load coming from Mexico.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: A River Runs Through It
programme.desc: A woman drives with 60 pounds of dope in her car trunk while her daughter sleeps in the backseat.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: A Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: With a large shipment of heroin about to arrive in Laredo, the LPD team conducts a citywide crackdown of suspected heroin dealers to learn where and when the drugs will arrive.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The Ledger
programme.desc: LPD Narcotics busts a stash house holding cocaine and guns, plus a ledger filled with information that could help end a heavy cocaine operation.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The Candyman
programme.desc: A series of controlled buys leads detectives to the house of a local dealer.

programme.title: Crime 360: At Death's Door
programme.desc: It's a race against time to identify a murder suspect before he disappears for good.

programme.title: Crime 360: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: In Cleveland, Ohio, lead homicide detective Wally Everett and his partner Mike Smith are called out to a crime scene where a body lays hidden between some hedges and the victim's grandmother's house.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: A Gathering of Evil
programme.desc: Teen runaway Maggie Fetty was found strangled to death on a mountain road.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Blood Red Highway
programme.desc: The elderly owners of a beloved local grocery are brutally attacked and left for dead. Working with little beyond a vague witness description, Lt. Joe Kenda leads a state-wide manhunt to catch a pair of cold-blooded killers before they disappear for good.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter Lt. Joe Kenda Investigates: A Halloween Mystery
Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Stuck in a Coffin
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a five-alarm fire, first responders discover a lifeless body. When Kenda learns that the deadly blaze was no accident, he launches a manhunt for a pyromaniac with a fiery temper and a callous disregard for human life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Lock the Door
programme.desc: Soon after the lifeless body of Charlie Tuttle was discovered behind a locked bedroom door, his death was ruled a suicide. Six months later however, Kenda receives an unprompted confession that propels the case in a whole new direction.

programme.title: Shattered: Requiem for Murder
programme.desc: In 1992, when a woman in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania is attacked, police eye a local family man as the suspect. But one detective thinks everyone's got it all wrong: this attack isn't a one-off - it's the work of a serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Jeckyll and Hyde
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda looks for answers in the death of Calvin Blair, a young man stabbed and left for dead on the roadside; when Alexandra Drake is shot in the face, she manages to tell police it was accidental but Kenda isn't so sure he believes her.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Lock the Door
programme.desc: Soon after the lifeless body of Charlie Tuttle was discovered behind a locked bedroom door, his death was ruled a suicide. Six months later however, Kenda receives an unprompted confession that propels the case in a whole new direction.

programme.title: The Murder Castle: A Place to Stay
programme.desc: A man lures eager, young women into his clutches and then they mysteriously vanish, never to be seen again.

programme.title: The Murder Castle: Down the Cellar
programme.desc: A man is forced to choose between his wife and mistress and can't decide which one to murder.

programme.title: The Murder Castle: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: Dr. H.H. Holmes is America's first serial killer and he built his castle with stolen money and keeps business brisk with stolen bodies.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Deadly Riddle
programme.desc: A young girl's killer sends police a series of mysterious riddles and the key to catching him are hidden within the answers.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Alone with Evil
programme.desc: A young mother is strangled to death during her overnight shift at an office building.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Terror in Waupaca
programme.desc: A young girl is abducted while playing outside her grandmother's house.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Mystery in the Mansion
programme.desc: On May 14, 2015, three members of a wealthy Washington, DC area family and their housekeeper were murdered in their own home. The victims were held hostage for 19 hours, starting on May 13.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: She was the bright, bubbly cheerleader. He was the football star. Teen sweethearts whose on-again, off-again relationship would end when one of them was found murdered.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Slenderman
programme.desc: New details emerged in the trial of the two girls who stabbed their best friend 19 times and left her for dead in the Wisconsin woods.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Ruthless Revenge
programme.desc: Revenge is a dish best served cold, and for these deadly women, it is the motto by which they live their lives.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lethal Teens
programme.desc: Teenage years can be fraught with difficulties. While some teens stay close to home, others stray from the fold to enter a different dark and dangerous world. Gifted with youth and burdened by demons, these Deadly Women look too young to do harm.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Green-eyed Monsters
programme.desc: For these heartless women envy is the deadliest sin. An obsessed mistress sacrifices her lover's wife; a young lover kills her girlfriend to keep her from the arms of another; and an angry cowgirl destroys her ex's life by destroying his family.

programme.title: American Monster: Anything for You
programme.desc: The Snyders are thrilled when their 34-year-old son Mike finally starts a family with his sweetheart - as seen in these home videos. But after being diagnosed with a terrible illness, Mike vanishes. Only years later does his horrific fate comes to light.

programme.title: The Mob Cops
programme.desc: In the 1980's and 90's the mafia controls the New York criminal underworld. But by the early 2000's evidence surfaces that the mob has gone much further and has people inside the NYPD. Now a dedicated team of detectives must find out who are the Mob Cops.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: The Boston Bandits
programme.desc: Up against an impenetrable code of silence in one of Boston's toughest neighbourhoods, a special FBI Task Force faces one of its toughest challenges yet, taking down a crew of professional robbers who've proven they're willing to kill.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Catching Crazy
programme.desc: A cop-shooting fugitive terrorizes banks in South Jersey. To smoke him out, the FBI teams with a local detective and an ex-cop informant. Even with the perfect trap, this crazy criminal isn't about to go down without a fight.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Hunting a Lone Wolf
programme.desc: The FBI's in a race against time once an IED is discovered along a Spokane, WA parade route. It's a hunt that will take them all across the Pacific Northwest for a lone wolf suspect before he tries to strike again.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Sadistic Mastermind
programme.desc: A sadistic criminal mastermind forces his victims to make a cruel choice: rob a bank or watch their family die. The FBI will need to take extraordinary measures to bringing this villain down before a chilling prophecy is fulfilled.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Kill Shot
programme.desc: The FBI is quickly running out of options to save a woman and her toddler from a kidnapper hell bent on murder. To get them out alive, an ingenious plan challenges the elite Hostage Rescue Team to lure the suspect into a sniper's crosshairs.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: The Boston Bandits
programme.desc: Up against an impenetrable code of silence in one of Boston's toughest neighbourhoods, a special FBI Task Force faces one of its toughest challenges yet, taking down a crew of professional robbers who've proven they're willing to kill.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Joseph Stalin
programme.desc: It's clear Nazi Germany lost the war, but the real winner remains uncertain. At the Yalta Conference, the United States, Britain and the Soviet Union compete for domination of Europe.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bill Doolin and The Oklahombres
programme.desc: In the 1890s, the Frontier had vanished, but in Bill Doolin, its spirit burned on. He terrorized Oklahoma with his brazen robberies and fought the greatest shootout in Western history.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bass Reeves: The Real Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Bass Reeves is no ordinary lawman. A slave set free by the Civil War, he hunts outlaws in the most dangerous territory in the nation. There is striking evidence that this fearless, legendary rider is the basis for the iconic character of the Lone Ranger.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.desc: A showcase of gourmet food for holiday entertaining or for gift giving.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Can You Dig It?
programme.desc: Mike and the team start on a third project and declare it 'The Toxic Townhouse' after a home inspection uncovers terrible toxic elements and a dangerous pipe issue. Then, the team makes another disturbing discovery at The City Barn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: No Bones About It
programme.desc: Police are called to investigate after Michael makes a startling discovery at The City Barn. Then, Mike shows The Toxic Townhouse's owners the structural issues and dangerous gas line.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Below Board
programme.desc: Mike Holmes discovers that a house that looks good on the outside is hiding a rotting secret just below the surface, and now it’s a problem that threatens an entire neighbourhood.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Urea Got Me
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house recently retrofitted with a substance that’s been banned in Canada for decades.
